settings.heading: Complete apparel sourcing solutions
settings.text: MSA Sourcing offers complete apparel sourcing solutions from vendor identification and product development to quality control, packaging, and shipment coordination, tailored to meet international standards and client expectations.

settings.title: MSA sourcing
settings.text: We provide sourcing support based on buyer requirements and orders, with information on possible suppliers for specific merchandise including quality, price and ability to meet shipment schedules.

settings.title: Production monitoring
settings.text: Our merchandising staff regularly monitors production on a daily basis to ensure correctly and aesthetically made products are delivered on time.

settings.title: Quality assurance
settings.text: Our quality assurance team conducts inline and final inspection as per international quality standards to ensure quality as specified by the buyer.

settings.title: Product development
settings.text: We undertake product development at different factories to meet buyer requirements for standards, prototypes, pattern check runs, production samples and fabric development.

settings.title: Communications
settings.text: MSA maintains an unbreakable communication network with customers and vendors, keeping them updated on their business with quick responses to any inquiry.

settings.title: Design development
settings.text: With strong support of vendors and textile professionals, MSA develops prototype patterns and samples, approval samples, grading to all requisite size ranges and size sets.

settings.title: Product analysis
settings.text: For each production specimen MSA analyzes and identifies the most suitable factory for the garment category, ensuring smooth production flow and timely shipping.

settings.title: Labeling & packing
settings.text: MSA helps production units import required labels and trims when not available locally. Our personnel ensure strict adherence to labeling, packing and carton marking instructions.

settings.title: Shipping coordination
settings.text: We coordinate with factories to check all shipping documents per buyer instructions and ensure dispatch of documents as per L/C dispatch instructions.

settings.title: Labor practices
settings.text: We ensure all production units follow healthy and safe labor practices, eliminating child labor, prison labor and forced labor, and providing required living and sanitation facilities.

settings.title: Fabric sourcing
settings.text: Our team identifies and sources premium quality fabrics from trusted mills worldwide, ensuring materials meet your specifications for quality, sustainability and compliance.

settings.title: Supply chain management
settings.text: We optimize your entire supply chain from raw materials to finished goods delivery, managing logistics, inventory control and vendor relationships for seamless operations.
